contents:
On this website you can find multiple challenges for all kinds of map knowledge, with versions in various languages available. If you self identify as a political decentralist, the internal structures of huge empires need to be well known by you, and I just took a test on Russian Geography, as the result is shown below.
Here is the link for my challenge, can you beat me?
https://www.geoguessr.com/vgp/3669
